prompt: A samurai in traditional armor standing under cherry blossoms
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a samurai in traditional armor standing under cherry blossoms. The samurai should be a full-body depiction, adopting the pose, intricate traditional armor details including the horned kabuto helmet, and weapon placement (katana held, two sheathed at hip) as shown in image 1. A vibrant canopy of pink cherry blossoms should be overhead, with petals gently falling around the samurai figure.
